title: lysimachia fistulosa var. wulingensis
intro: Lysimachia fistulosa var. wulingensis, also known as Wuling lysimachia, is a plant species in the genus Lysimachia, belonging to the family Primulaceae. It is a perennial herb native to China, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Wuling lysimachia is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and respiratory infections, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in herbal capsules, to harness its health benefits, promoting immune function and reducing oxidative stress.
